description: Constitutional thresholds enforcing the asymmetric ladder + non-decreasing cooldown invariants. Cross-field rules SP-1..2 in constraints/SuccessionPolicy.constraints.json.

org_id.description: UUID v4 of the org this policy is bound to.

threshold.description: Quorum fraction in [0, 1] required to enact this action. Compared across actions by the SP-1 asymmetric-ladder rule.

cooldown_seconds.description: Minimum elapsed seconds between successive actions of this kind. Compared across actions by the SP-2 non-decreasing-cooldown rule.

threshold.description: Quorum fraction in [0, 1] required to enact this action. Compared across actions by the SP-1 asymmetric-ladder rule.

cooldown_seconds.description: Minimum elapsed seconds between successive actions of this kind. Compared across actions by the SP-2 non-decreasing-cooldown rule.

cooldown_seconds.description: Minimum elapsed seconds between successive actions of this kind. Compared across actions by the SP-2 non-decreasing-cooldown rule.

effective_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp from which this policy is in force.
